Comment: The homepage is easy to navigate and events are well organized.
Search works well but filter labels should be clearer.
The event information is complete and easy to understand.
Registration was simple but some field labels could be clearer.
The dashboard gives a clear overview of upcoming events.
Creating an event is easy but categories could be better organized.
Updating event details is quick and straightforward.
I couldn't easily find the correct category filter.
The registration process is fast and user-friendly.
Everything is easy to locate from the homepage.
The dashboard is useful but could display more event statistics.
